title: EditWindow Property
description: The EditWindow property is used to activate edit window mode which allows don't care pixels to be defined for a search window.
notes:
The EditWindow property can be accessed from the property list of Vision Guide.  Click the Value field of EditWindow property to display the button.  When the button is clicked, Edit Window mode is activated.

Button	Tool tip:
		 Brief description

Position
		 and size the window: Click this button to position and
		 size the SearchWindow.

To position the search window, click the
		 name of the vision object, or the search window

itself, and then drag the Vision object
		 to whatever position you like.

To adjust the size, use the search window
		 size handles.

Paint
		 don't care pixels: Click this button to paint don't care
		 pixels freely. When moving a pointer to a paint area, the pointer
		 mark will change to "□". Drag the points where you want to set
		 don't care pixels. The size of "□" can be changed on the edit
		 toolbar.

Rectangle:
		 Paints don't care pixels with a rectangle.

Ellipse:
		 Paints don't care pixels with an ellipse.

Erase
		 don't care pixels: Click this button to delete don't care
		 pixels partly. When moving a pointer to a paint area, the pointer
		 mark will change to "□". Drag the points where you want to delete
		 don't care pixels. The size of "□" can be changed on the edit
		 toolbar.

Erase
		 all don't care pixels: Click this button to deletes all
		 don't care pixels.

Transparent
		 don't care pixels: Selects whether to make don't care pixels
		 to semi-transparent or non-transparent.
